ques: Find out where and when the most recent UEFA Champions League final was held, and which team won.
answer: The most recent UEFA Champions League final was the 2026 final, held on 30 May 2026 at the Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary. Paris Saint-Germain won it, defeating Arsenal 1–1 after extra time and 4–3 on penalties, retaining their title.
